name: Queen Feather and Down Mattress Topper Box - Casaluna™
description:
Add an extra layer of comfort to your mattress with this Feather & Down Mattress Topper Box from Casaluna™. This queen mattress topper has a white fabric box-stitched design and boasts 4.5 inches of a feather-down blend filling for warm, luxurious comfort. The hypoallergenic mattress topper is comfortable to use and helps increase the lifespan and comfort of your existing bedding base.

Casaluna™: Where calm and comfort are naturally at home.
